meta.title: Software Identity And The Naming Of Things
meta.description:
Lindsey Cerkovnik of CISA addresses one of the biggest challenges to SBOMs, vulnerability management, license management and other tasks is consistent and available naming (well, actual identity) of software and software components.

Then Lindsey talks about three possible solutions, CPE, SWID Tags, and Purls, and the challenges using each of these. Where is the global identifier solution?
